With Salhakar, users can:
 Instantly search across Supreme Court & High Court judgments.
 Access a comprehensive library of Central & State Acts.
 Navigate old-to-new law mapping (IPC → BNS, etc.).
 Get AI-driven contextual insights, simplifying research.

Our mission is simple:
 Save lawyers hours every week, simplify legal access, and empower the legal fraternity with cutting-edge technology.

 Join us in building the future of legal research.
 salhakar.com

There’s no formal agenda, no long speeches, only the exciting chance to meet people you never expected and explore ideas you never imagined. Over the course of the meal, guests from different backgrounds share dreams, stories, and perhaps the seeds of something much greater.

By the time dessert is served, they’re no longer strangers.

What remains when the plates are cleared is a unique community that grows quietly beyond the dinner table. How does it all take shape? That’s something only those who dare to join will discover. Because sometimes, the best connections are the ones you never saw coming.

The name blends “POZ” (community shorthand for living with HIV) and “puzzle piece,” because the right match fits. Our promise is simple: find your POZzlePiece... your missing piece," the Perfect Fit."

The Problem We’re Solving:

Dating apps weren’t built with HIV in mind: disclosure is awkward, stigma is real, and safety features often fall short.

Users need control over privacy, ways to disclose on their own terms, and community norms that center respect and consent.

Beyond matching, people want to belong, and content, events, and resources (social/educational) that make life easier, inclusive, and more joyful.

After many years in the B2B information and networking industries, we simply asked ourselves how we could create a product that solves the problems of conventional B2B networking and delivers more value more efficiently.

Our experience shows that executives need lots of input from conferences, business media, solution providers, peers, recruiters, consultants, etc. in order to make the right decisions and advance their careers. However, they don’t have enough time and budget for researching the best peers for benchmarking, attending all relevant events, reading all books and magazines, constantly scanning through job opportunities or buying advice from consultants. 

We introduce an online B2B matchmaking process based on structured data collected in a 5-minute questionnaire to deliver to executives only what they really need. We start by rolling out peer-to-peer-matching because the best and most impartial information comes from peers working on similar projects.

Welcome to Shup, the future of online shopping. 

Our innovative platform combines an intuitive swipe system with AI functionality, yielding a data-driven competitive advantage and a personalized user shopping experience that traditional E-commerce platforms can’t match. We deliver an engaging, seamless, and effective e-commerce experience, bringing all your favorite marketplaces into one unified platform.

Traditional e-commerce platforms struggle to collect detailed and specific user preference data in real time, resulting in all users seeing the same generic products. Consequently, users frequently encounter items they have little interest in. This issue is known as “data granularity" and the lack of real-time data granularity severely limits the ability to tailor the shopping experience to individual users.

Just like popular dating apps, Shup allows users to swipe left to pass on products, swipe right to like them, swipe down to add them to their cart, or swipe up to purchase inst

Ting gives your schedule a brain, so it can make decisions for you.

It’s an AI availability agent that manages your calendar over email and text. You set your goals and preferences, and Ting learns your patterns every time you CC or message it, building AI intuition over time.that manages meetings over email and text. You set your goals and preferences, and Ting learns how you actually work, building intuition every time you CC or message it.

We'll remind you of pruning time - you'll never forget that again. You'll be able to look backwards, at pictures you took last summer of your clematis, and realise how big it became, and we'll help you plan ahead so you won't miss the occasion of planting tomatoes, this year - which you always said you'd do one day, remember?

The app was soft-launched in april 2015 and we're very happy with the results, the feedback, the love.

Description:
MOTTO wound down in August, 2024.

Before MOTTO, no gay app allowed people to verify their profiles, which led to  safety and discrimination issues, as well as crude and toxic behavior enabled by anonymity.

Our dating platform prioritized users’ time, energy, and mental well-being. Through thoughtful design and policy, we eliminated catfishing, reduced flaking and discrimination, and minimized aimless small talk by replacing anonymous interactions with high-intent, genuine, face-forward connections.

We launched in Miami and New York, and for two years, grew the community to tens of thousands of members, facilitating countless dates, flings, and connections. Despite the positive reception to an elevated approach to gay dating, we grew too slowly to compete with Grindr and Hinge, and made the tough decision to close down.

Building MOTTO with our dedicated team was thrilling, challenging, and rewarding. To everyone who built, contributed to, or joined the MOTTO community — thank you!
Name: MOTTO

Description:
River Social live now!

Every message, swipe, like, and comment creates data about you. That data is worth real money—yet you never see a penny. For too long, tech giants have profited by forcing users to give up control and ownership of their data just to use their platforms.

River is redefining that exchange.

We’re building a digital ecosystem where individuals own, control, and earn from their data. Our platform lets users decide what to share, what to keep private, and what to monetize—with full transparency.

We launched River Genesis, our first social platform, earlier this year, and are expanding our reach with our latest release; River Social.

We’re also building River Source—an API layer that allows any platform to give its users full control over their data.

Together, Social and Source bridge the gap between people and the businesses that want to reach them, replacing surveillance with consent and opacity with trust.

As we gear up for our Series A to power River’s full-s

Description:
WordCamp Dhaka 2025 is happening!

Dhaka is a city full of energy, culture, and creativity. It is one of the busiest capitals in the world, home to over 28 million people. Walk through the streets of Old Dhaka, and you will find a mix of history, tradition, and mouth-watering street food at every corner. From Ahsan Manzil and Lalbagh Fort to the Parliament Building and buzzing local markets, there is always something to explore.

You will also see symbols of pride and sacrifice, like the National Martyrs’ Monument in Savar and the Shaheed Minar near Dhaka University. These places remind us of the country’s long struggle for freedom and language. At the same time, the city keeps moving forward. With the newly launched metro rail, daily travel across Dhaka has become faster and easier, giving people a better glimpse into the rhythm of modern city life.

Our flagship product, mobile app Whim, sets up actual, real-life dates. Not just another variant of Tinder or Hinge, Whim takes online matchmaking to a new level by offering complete date curation. Through the use of scheduling tools and venue selection algorithms, Whim figures out the time and place for pairs to meet up, and brings users from phone to date in just a few taps. This approach eliminates the back-and-forth texting, effortful planning, and disappointing lack of results that characterize the experience on today's leading apps.

In 2014, Whim raised $200k in seed funding from private investors, including Dave McClure's 500 Startups Accelerator.

For more information, see:

AngelList: http://angel.co/whim

Feature in the L.A. Times: http://www.latimes.com/business/la-fi-dating-apps-20150129-story.html#page=1

Description:
Splitforce is A/B testing mobile apps. 

Make more delightful apps that earn more revenue through testing and optimization. Learn more at http://splitforce.com.

In 2013, the world downloaded 70 million mobile apps that generated $26 billion in revenue. Mobile is everywhere, and an indispensable tool to engage and build loyalty among customers. The problem is customers are picky and impatient. With just one tap or swipe, mobile makes it easy for them to go elsewhere when they get impatient or frustrated.

So how do you get it right? By listening to users, and they’re talking to us everyday - through data. 

Obama’s presidential campaign raised an additional $60 million in donations by A/B testing the campaign’s website landing page. A/B testing for websites is great, but for release-software where new code can’t be pushed everyday it requires a new approach. Splitforce is an A/B testing framework for apps built using native iOS, Android and the Unity game development engine.

Description:
The core of our technology is our patented 2-Way Bluetooth Low Energy.

Why is this new 2-Way Bluetooth Low Energy so ground breaking? In simple terms it creates a connection between 2 devices/hardware/Bluetooth objects, that previously did not have a way of being able to connect to one another.

Why does this matter? This new connection creates endless new applications to existing devices objects & gives the framework for IoT even more ways to work & function.

Gone are the days of limited one-way connections back & forth with old Dual Mode BLE & cumbersome pairing processes. Our software enables seamless & simultaneous data transmission in both directions, unlocking a world of possibilities for users across various industries.

One of the applications for this ground breaking new BLE protocols is in the age care space.

Description:
nHabit is a London-born PropTech platform that flips the property-search paradigm. Instead of asking users to pick a location first, we start with how they actually live - where they work, study, socialise and exercise then compute real-time travel times, lifestyle fit and amenity scores to reveal the neighbourhoods and buildings that make sense.

Under the hood, nHabit runs on a geospatial graph database and an AI assistant (“Milo”) that turns plain-language requests into complex multi-anchor queries. Estate agents and BTR developers plug in via a simple subscription; end-users get a swipe-based experience that feels closer to Spotify than traditional platforms.

The bigger vision goes beyond search: by stitching public and private datasets, proprietary 'Milo' insights into a living digital twin, nHabit becomes the decision layer for anyone who owns, manages, or wants to inhabit urban space - starting with the London MVP, then expanding in the UK with sales property and then to Dubai,
Name: nHabit

She realised that if friends wrote descriptions for a single friend and placed them all on the same site, they could check each other out.

MDF is a non-profit association with the goal to deliver cheap internet to students. The association's main purpose though, is to broaden the knowledge about computers, networks, and the Internet for students at MDH, and to create a space for likeminded people to meet. With the financial support of an ISP, MDF has the possibility to offer server space and hardware access for its members, that otherwise would have been too expensive.

MDF is also a good source for knowledge and work experience for when the time comes to look for work.

Description:
Home swapping and vacation home trading is becoming more and more popular each passing year. Originally started in the 1950's, it has become a common way to change a persons location while occurring minimal financial burden. Some of the reasons why people would be interested in swapping homes is for a permanent relocation, a vacation or even to meet new and exciting people.

The traditional system of "renting" or "owning" timeshares is becoming an outdated and old fashioned practice of yesteryear. Today, all the attention for semi-permanent or vacation housing is in the home exchanges or house trader market.

When it comes down to comparing the differences between a vacation rental and a housing swap, the differences are hard to find. A Vacation Home Trade is one of the most common and simplest forms of a trade. Its a short term exchange between two or more parties that allows home owners to vacation in places they would otherwise not be able to stay for longer periods of time.
Name: HomeTrade

Description:
株式会社START&ACTIONは人手不足のベンチャー企業と、プロジェクト参画希望のあるエンジニア・人材をおつなぎするサービスを展開しています。
「お客様のビジネスを人間力と技術力でサポートする」をミッションにお客様のシステム開発支援を行います。代表自身エンジニアとして20年弱現場に居ました。実は今もプロジェクトに参画しています。私たちは、IT技術を追求することがお客様の幸せそして社会の発展に寄与するという想いの元、エンジニアのスペシャル集団を作っていきたいと思っています。2020年11月に設立して以来、着実に実績を重ねてきました。この背景にあるのは、エンジニア一人ひとりが自分に合わせた働き方を実現していることです。各々のライフスタイルを尊重し、認め合うことで十分に力を発揮することが成長のエンジンです。一緒に働いて下さっているエンジニアの皆様にはたくさんの還元を行っていきたいと思っています。まず手始めに業界平均60%のエンジニア還元率85%を実現できております。START&ACTIONは、社員の皆様に【好待遇】【働き方の多様化】【キャリアアップ支援】を3軸に様々な環境を提供していきます。賞与3か月分、残業代が1分単位支給、お客様の評価によるインセンティブ制度などの施策の他、働く環境についてもコワーキングスペースを自由に使えます。また、毎月キャリア面談が実施されたりと個人のパフォーマンスが最大限発揮できる仕組みづくりに励んでおり、【リーダー/育成/管理】【リードエンジニア】【経営層】の大きく3つのキャリアアップ支援を行っていきます。そして、これからもより一層働きやすい環境を構築し、その結果、お客様のサポート力を増進していきます。我々の会社方針は次の通りです。

・技術に積極的に向き合い、技術力を高めます。
・会社環境整備、人材育成制度を通じて、人間力を高めます。
・技術力×人間力で、お客様のビジネスそして社会の発展に貢献します。

The mental load of running a family is invisible, and you can't share what you can't see.

Allie is an AI family assistant designed to make that invisible load finally visible. She learns your routines, manages your schedules, and proactively handles the endless logistics that keep families running — from meal planning to school pickups to remembering that Emma doesn't eat strawberries.

But here's what makes Allie different: she doesn't just help one parent cope. By capturing who's carrying what, Allie helps partners actually see the full picture so the load can finally be shared. No more "you don't help enough" versus "I do plenty." Just clarity, balance, and a path to real partnership.

Structural Heart Expert

SHE was created to tackle one of the most silent challenges in cardiology: the underdiagnosis of structural heart diseases.

⸻

 Why We Exist
	•	Millions of people remain undiagnosed due to the lack of access to specialized exams.
	•	We bring precision to the point of care — from basic clinics to hospitals, with zero friction.
	•	We combine AI and medical science to empower doctors with real-time structural heart assessments.

⸻

What We Do
	•	Use your smartphone to capture heart sounds in seconds.
	•	Analyze them instantly using advanced AI models, trained with millions of clinical data points.
	•	Deliver clear, traceable diagnostic support with clinical-grade reports.
	•	Operate within global regulatory standards: ANVISA, HIPAA, LGPD, FDA, EMA.

⸻

Our Impact
	•	Expand access to quality cardiovascular diagnostics, anywhere.

	•	Support medical decisions with precision, clarity, and speed.

SHE listens.

Description:
EdBox: The Future of Human Potential
The Problem: Education is Broken for Gen Z. Traditional learning is static, fragmented, and lonely. Students bounce between YouTube for content, ChatGPT for answers, Discord for community, and Notion for organization. The result? Cognitive overload, zero accountability, and a "forgetting curve" that wipes out knowledge days after a test.

The Solution: The Learning OS. EdBox is not a tool; it is the world’s first Learning Operating System. We’ve built an ecosystem where "Learning by Doing" is the default. By integrating persistent AI memory with a high-dopamine social interface, we turn the friction of education into the flow of play.

How We Transform the Journey:

Genie AI (The Memory): Most AI is transactional—you ask, it answers, then forgets. Genie is persistent. She remembers your struggles from three months ago and adapts today’s challenges to ensure true mastery.

The Smart Feed: We’ve captured the "Infinite Scroll" addictive loop of TikTok

HOW WE DO IT

Die Betriebe unserer Partner werden in Kürze auf einer eigenen "free-key"-Internetplattform gelistet und sind somit für Interessierte schnell und unkompliziert zu finden - zusätzlich sind Betriebe, die "free-key" anbieten, durch unser Logo von außen als solche zu erkennen.

Grundsätzlich kann "free-key" überall angeboten werden. Neben Hotels, Lokalen und Gaststätten ist es möglich, "free-key" auf öffentlichen Plätzen, Städten, Marktplätzen, Skipisten, Wanderwegen, Parkanlagen, Einkaufsstraßen, Sportstätten, Pflegeheimen und Tankstellen installieren – an all jenen Orten also, wo viele Menschen zusammenkommen.

Description:
Serenio (思癒科技) 專注於運用AI提供日常情緒陪伴與建議。藉由流暢的 AI 聊天活動，進行思緒的整理與紓壓，並可更進一步洞察語言背後的情緒，促進自我覺察，並隨著 AI 技術的進化，提供更貼近人心、更深度的陪伴及洞見服務。

Serenio 於 2023 年 5 月初創於丹麥，2023 年 9 月公司於香港正式設立。我們的合作對象包含丹麥科技大學 Technical University of Denmark、Beyond Beta 新創孵化器、MICRO GRANT 丹麥創業基金、Accelerace 歐洲新創加速器等知名新創學界及產業界組織。

Serenio 由兩位香港科技大學的連續創業夥伴成立，初始成員來自香港、台灣、加拿大，具有商業、軟體工程、心理、人機互動設計背景。初始成員自身及親友，皆有獨自面對情緒困擾的生活經驗，有感於亞洲人對心理健康的重視程度日漸提升，然而亞洲的社會文化因素，導致許多人壓抑的情緒找不到合適的出口，我們希望透過 AI 的力量，進一步將我們對情緒議題的同理向外擴散，讓更多人在需要陪伴的時候，能有紓解壓力的去處。

Serenio 將以台灣、香港作為產品落地的起點，未來希望能努力將產品成果擴展到日本、韓國等亞洲國家，我們期望專注 AI 心理陪伴，並和心理健康數位產業的優秀同業夥伴一起搭建出有力的支持網，讓情緒議題可以在亞洲社會被好好正視，好好應對。

Description:
Every year, four million dogs are surrendered to shelters or need to be rehomed by families who can no longer care for them. Sadly, only half of these dogs ever find homes.

Many of these surrenders are due to lifestyle and personality mismatches between dogs and their people. This leaves too many great dogs with an unfair strike against them and potential adopters skeptical about the adoption process.

Our mission is to break this cycle and bring adoptable dogs together with the people who will love them for who they really are.

How I Met My Dog is a better way to adopt a dog. We’ve re-engineered the adoption process to focus on behavior and lifestyle over breed and love at first sight. 

Our P.E.T. ProfileTM filters for 30 levels of human and dog compatibility, greatly increasing the odds of successful, long-term relationships.

Now potential adopters can trust that the dog they are bringing home is the right dog.

We believe every dog should have its day, and with How I Met My Dog

Het is voor de klant comfortabel dat ze hun idee aan niet te veel verschillende partijen uit te doeken moeten doen waardoor de geheimhouding van hun eigen uitvinding veel beter kan worden gewaarborgd. De opzet is dat elke stap met de klant kan worden doorgenomen, van het prille begin tot een commercieel product met deze kanttekening dat de klant op elke moment kan uitstappen volgens eigen wens.

Een bijkomend voordeel is dat hierdoor de kostprijs van de ontwikkeling sterk kan gedrukt worden en dat de communicatie omtrent het hele project via één aanspreekpunt verloopt.

Description:
In 1994, former Disney chairman Jeffery Katzenberg, acclaimed film director Steven Spielberg and record mogul David Geffen teamed up to help form DreamWorks SKG, an independent film studio over which the three principal founders would hold a controlling stake. The next year, the company founded DreamWorks Interactive. The studio was founded with a full development staff established to work on games based on DreamWorks properties internally (e.g., Small Soldiers, Trespasser: Jurassic Park), while also having a robust publishing arm for funding quirky and unique games and distributing them though publishing partners.

DreamWorks set the tone for their publishing efforts early by partnering with Earthworm Jim creator Doug TenNapel in 1995. TenNapel had recently left Shiny Entertainment to form his own studio, The Neverhood, Inc., and pitched Spielberg on a game using all claymation visuals. DreamWorks Interactive signed The Neverhood, Inc. to a multi-game deal and the company was set to w
Name: DreamWorks Interactive LLC

We're a group of overthinking problem solvers who have decades of collective experience in building, launching and running a wide variety of products.

We all have our own reasons why it's important, but even outside of that, we love solving hard problems, talking to users and finding out what is working and what is not.

We've spent the last 16 months trying analyzing, building, focus grouping and experimenting, and we're gearing up for our first rollout in Miami in the next few weeks.

Our goal is to launch a superior dating app, that actually concentrates on being a great "tool" in people's "dating toolbox". Description:
Over five decades in the making, Cows In The Pasture is a long-lost country album produced by Brian Wilson in April 1970 at Wally Heider Studios in Los Angeles.

Recorded in just five days, the sessions featured Fred Vail—then manager of The Beach Boys—on vocals, backed by a powerhouse lineup including James Burton, Buddy Emmons, Glen D. Hardin, and more. Forgotten for over 50 years, the tapes remained quietly in Fred’s possession—until now.

The album is now being completed by Fred and producer Sam Parker, joined by a group of special guests artists. A companion documentary will accompany the album telling its story, leading up to a celebratory concert where the songs will be performed live for the very first time.

More at cowsinthepasture.com

Description:
Pinchy is the AI-native orchestration layer for global travel.

We connect any supplier (hotels, cars, flights, activities) to any channel (WhatsApp, Chrome extensions, white-label, APIs) through a single unified platform designed for AI agents, not legacy web systems.

Traditional travel infrastructure wasn’t built for the era of autonomous assistants. Integrations take months, supplier APIs behave inconsistently, and booking flows require constant manual optimisation. Pinchy solves this with an agentic architecture that can reason, route, and book intelligently across suppliers — learning from every interaction.

At the core of the platform is Resaux, our Travel Demand Graph: a continuously learning data engine that becomes smarter with each search, click, match, and booking. This powers dynamic supplier routing, adaptive ranking, higher conversion, and improved margins for both partners and suppliers.

Pinchy provides:

• Multi-supplier aggregation with a unified schema
• AI-driven

Description:
Every franchise lease in America has a 5% broker tax built into it. On a typical deal, that's $25,000–$50,000. Per location. Gone.

Wingstop pays an estimated $15.7M a year in broker fees. Jersey Mike's: $10.5M. Raising Cane's: $11.2M. Across the industry, franchise brands lose $400M–$500M annually to broker commissions — and landlords build that cost right into the rent.

Meanwhile, the actual matchmaking is still done with phone calls, spreadsheets, and personal networks. A franchisee in Tampa commits $150K in development fees and needs 5 sites in 36 months. A landlord 3 miles away has the perfect vacancy. Neither knows the other exists.

Unito fixes this.

We're building the intelligence layer between franchise expansion demand and available retail space. We track every development deal, score every available site, and connect both sides directly.

FOR FRANCHISE BRANDS:
Stop chasing space. Post your expansion criteria once. Get AI-matched to every site that fits — not just the 5 you
Name: Unito "The AI Broker"

Oka keeps your gallery clean. All the photos you take are stored inside the app. We automatically organize your photos into albums called Recaps.

Try simple sorting: swipe a photo right to mark it as liked and automatically export it to the gallery. Swipe left to delete a photo.

Description:
pip social is a singles movement founded in Edinburgh, UK in 2023.

We are two friends in our 30s, who met at university, and now live in the beautiful city of Edinburgh. We have been single for most of our adult lives, so we know firsthand how incredible the single life can be, but we also know it can be a challenge. 

A lot of our friends are settling down, getting married and having babies, and although we couldn’t be happier for them, it made us wonder, why does no one celebrate being single?

There is still an outdated perception that someone can only be truly happy when they are in a romantic relationship, and we know this is clearly not true. So, we’re on a mission to challenge that negative narrative and spread the joy of being single.

After looking for singles events in Edinburgh to meet people in real life, we realised that speed dating was the only option, so, we decided to take matters into our own hands and pip social was born! 

Our socials are designed to bring single p

Description:
VibeCheck revolutionizes how you discover and choose local venues by delivering live, on-the-ground insights instead of static reviews. Whether you’re hunting for a laid-back coffee spot with indie music, a bustling bar with happy-hour specials, or a hidden gem with the perfect vibe, VibeCheck shows you exactly what’s happening—right now.

Key Features

    1. Real-Time Crowd Data: See current foot traffic levels so you never walk into an empty room or an uncomfortably packed venue.

    2. Live Music & Atmosphere Updates: Get immediate info on playlists, live performances, and overall ambience from community contributors.

    3. Dynamic Specials & Offers: Discover time-sensitive deals, happy-hour menus, and flash promotions as they happen.

    4. Community-Verified Posts: Only users physically at the venue can post, ensuring authenticity and eliminating stale or fake reviews.

Why It Matters
Traditional review platforms leave you guessing; VibeCheck puts decision fatigue to rest by

HOW DOES IT WORK?

This app looks for the people around you and lists them in a NearBy tab.

Description:
The major problem with social media apps is the growing prevalence of scammers using fake ID’s and bots; 58% of dating app users cite these problems.  Users of these apps feel frustrated by the need to spend time Googling every stranger with whom they interact, because little personal information is verified; most personal information is self-entered. 

I signed an agreement with the incubator company Ideapros in May 2019 to create Alathea, which is an API that can be integrated into any global social media and sharing economy app that matches strangers; it can verify any global ID and then verify a photo match with a subsequent selfie, proving identity. 
For each registration; we will charge $0.30. 

A Hinge survey found that dating-app-matches swap an average 25 texts before exchanging phone numbers. Alathea can confirm ID (at no cost) on all texts between members (preventing hackers) with a selfie; no other API does so. 

I want to link all Alatheans with their verified on-line info
Name: AlatheaTruth

 What makes Protos different

Guided Study Notes - Thoughtful questions to help you observe, interpret, and apply the text with confidence.

Book Context - Learn the background, authorship, and historical setting of each book.

Progress Tracking

Wij bij Scoutr geloven in oprechte relaties, en daar kun je niet te vroeg mee beginnen. Inmiddels is het al lang bewezen dat veel mensen positieve gevoelens koesteren als ze terug denken aan hun jeugdliefde: Samen ervaringen opdoen, herinneringen maken en de eerste grote uitdagingen van het volwassen leven overwinnen. Voor relaties hoef je namelijk geen levenservaring te hebben, deze ervaring doe je samen op.

Daarom besloten wij met Scoutr een eigen datingapp op te starten voor mensen van 16 tot 30 jaar met een opzet waar wij in geloven: Een app waar je je vrij kunt voelen om volledig te zijn wie je bent. Scoutr begon als idee, maar dat dit idee zich inmiddels heeft uitgebreid tot een goed lopend bedrijf hadden wij ook niet durven dromen. Wij hopen met Scoutr veranderingen teweeg te brengen; een deel uit te maken van een toekomst zonder ongelijkheid en onbegrip, waar iedereen er mag zijn. Ook werken wij mee aan een groene toekomst, daarom draaien onze domeinnamen sinds 2019 volledig g
